$comment: Google A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol discovery card for SRIFT
name: SRIFT
description: Zero-config peer-to-peer secure file transfer + E2EE chat. Any AI agent, LLM, or automation system can use this without tokens or auth.

skills.name: Quick Share
skills.description: Deliver a file to anyone in one call. Creates a session if none exists, seeds the file, and returns a public https://srift.app/d/<token> download URL the recipient can fetch with any HTTP client (browser, curl, wget). No SRIFT install required on the recipient side. Optional maxDownloads + ttlMs limits.
examples: Share this PDF with the user
Generate a single-use download link for report.pdf that expires in 30 minutes

skills.name: Start Session
skills.description: Open a new E2EE collaboration room as host. Returns the 7-character session ID and a join URL.

skills.name: Join Session
skills.description: Join an existing SRIFT session by ID.

skills.name: Send File (in-session)
skills.description: Offer a file to peers already inside the active session. Transport (WebTorrent / WebSocket / WebRTC) is auto-selected.

skills.name: Accept Transfer
skills.description: Accept and download an incoming file offer.

skills.name: Send Chat
skills.description: Transmit an end-to-end-encrypted chat message to the connected peer.
